sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60010" key="kriodo/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑο-δόχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frame of a battering-ram</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:13:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.10</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
